title.en: Seeing this scene, most of the True Monarchs we...

content.en:
The Dao Ancestors laid out the prohibition, and some True Monarchs were ready to try it.

The first True Monarch to rush forward was a powerful True Monarch who had cultivated at the peak of the True Spirit Realm, although it was far from being comparable to the True Monarch List, but if it was placed in the entire Quasi-Dao Realm, it would at least be able to rank among the millions.

Being able to rank into a million is already very powerful, after all, there are hundreds of millions of true monarchs in the quasi-Dao realm.

Therefore, this kind of true monarch is simply one in a million strong, and naturally it is not weak.

Rumble!

The True Monarch tried to rush into the ruins, but no matter how much he hit the ban, he couldn't break it, and he couldn't stop it with a powerful attack, not even a ripple.

Seeing this scene, most of the True Monarchs were in despair.

In their opinion, their strength is not as good as this true monarch, and they will definitely not be able to enter the ruins.

Then.

A True Monarch Bang True Monarch casually broke the ban and entered the ruins.

And the other True Monarchs wanted to follow this True Monarch to enter by the way, but they didn't expect the prohibition to instantly shock this prohibition away.

"If you put Zhenjun into the internal space, you should be able to bring it in!"

Youzhenjun suddenly thought.

This method is indeed good, because which true monarch does not have some life forms on his body, and has not been expelled from it?

As a result, a top True Monarch broke into the ruins with a group of weak True Monarchs.

But soon, they were shocked to find that those True Monarchs couldn't come out of the ruins at all, and if they forcibly came out, they would still be banned and thrown out.

Cheating is impossible to cheat, so many true monarchs can only honestly break the ban.

Ye Tian originally wanted to take Yanglong Zhenjun into the ruins, but now there is no way to use the cheating method, so he can only let Yanglong Zhenjun leave, and he enters the ruins alone.

......

Relic.

The sky was gray, there was no sun, no sun, no moon and no stars, but for the True Monarchs, even if this space was dark, it would not affect their vision, and in their eyes it would be like day.

Ye Tian stepped on the ground of the relic space and frowned slightly.

"Dead silence, no life!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Judging from the situation in his eyes, it should be difficult for this relic space to give birth to any cultivation resources, after all, such a harsh environment is not suitable for the growth and evolution of those resources at all.

However, this is a ruin, and the real harvest naturally comes from those ruins, and if you get some inheritance, it will be more useful than any other resource.

Swish!!!!

A true monarch did not stop, and walked towards a group of ruined buildings in the distance.

Just as they were about to arrive at the complex, one by one the true monarchs fell from the sky like dumplings, and they came into close contact with the earth.

Of course, the True Monarchs didn't have any discomfort when they hit the ground, they just looked a little embarrassed.

"What's going on?"

"It's strange, we are true monarchs, how can we suddenly fall?"

"It's the Forbidden Sky Array, this should be the headquarters or branch of a certain sect's ruins, and flying is prohibited. Among the top forces of our Chaos Division, such formations have also been arranged, otherwise some Heavenly Monarchs are flying around in the True Ancestor or Dao Ancestor First Born, is that still like words?"

"But this forbidden sky array is a little strange, it's not the same as the forbidden sky array of our God of War Tower!"

"It is estimated that it is a variant of some kind of forbidden air array, there are so many formations in Chaos, how can they all be the same!"

......

Under the shroud of the Forbidden Sky Great Array, many True Monarchs could only honestly walk among the ruins, and their speed was naturally greatly affected.

Moreover, Ye Tian also found that in this area of the ruins, it was impossible to shuttle through space at all, and the space-time transfer technique could only be used as a speed magic power.

This complex of buildings is very large, and the architectural style is very strange, it is a semicircular building, large and small, dotted on this land like stars, and each building is wrapped in a formation.

However, many of the buildings are in dilapidation, and some are only in ruins.

Ye Tian came to the ruins of a building and carefully explored the ruined building, but found that the materials of this building were very unusual.

"A rare metal that can even be used to refine Arcana!"

Ye Tian judged.

The supreme treasure in the universe is like a toy to the true monarchs, but to the low-level cultivators, the supreme treasure is incomparably precious!

And no matter how many materials can be used to refine Arcana, they won't be used to build buildings!

There are so many buildings in this area, and if so many materials are used to refine the treasure, it will be hundreds of millions!

"What a rich force!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although he didn't like these materials, he still collected them one by one, he couldn't use them, and he could completely throw them to the Terrans!

The Terrans need more of these materials, the better, and there will be no dislike.

This ruined building occupies a radius of dozens of miles, and Ye Tian's divine sense easily enveloped this area, and after carefully probing it, he still gained something in the end.

Dozens of mutilated books, dozens of mutilated Chaos Arcana fragments, some daily necessities, and a small amount of resources.

This space is very magical, even after a long time, these things have not turned into ashes, which shows that this place can withstand the passage of time.

Ye Tian checked those classics, but found that they were all ordinary classics, similar to some resources, and a few relatively low-level secret techniques, all of which were relatively incomplete and of little value.

But Ye Tian still knew something from these classics.

For example, this is the headquarters of a sect, and this sect is called the Heavenly Ape Sect, which is the information recorded in a beginner's manual.

It is worth mentioning that the words here are different from the words commonly used in chaos, if it weren't for this kind of text that fits the Great Dao, Ye Tian would not have been able to understand the meaning.

"Strange, weird!"

Ye Tian frowned deeply.

The power of a sect is not weak, how can such a relic appear in the Quasi-Dao Realm???

The Quasi-Dao Realm is promoted from the fusion of two ordinary universes, and there is no way to accommodate the Heavenly Monarch and the above strong people in the ordinary universe, even if there are sect relics, it is also a weak sect, and the strongest one is at most a god general.

Moreover, he basically understood the situation of the two ordinary universes very well now, and the Heavenly Ape Sect was definitely not the force born in these two universes.

Other than that.

The traces that have existed here are too old, and they are definitely an incomparably ancient force.

It was extremely strange that such a force suddenly appeared in the Quasi-Dao Realm.

"Could it be that the Dao Ancestors moved this space from somewhere in the chaos and merged into the Quasi-Dao Realm?"

Ye Tian guessed.

But this kind of speculation can't stand scrutiny, and there is no need for Dao Ancestors to do this!

"Forget it, let's look for the baby!"

Ye Tian no longer thought about this problem, but went to find the treasures and inheritances in the ruins.
